brief: The US imposes new global tariffs tied to forced labor, stocks tumble amid AI spending concerns, and four young mathematicians receive Fields Medals. Amazon updates Alexa Plus with smarter home control, while research papers explore clinical workflow optimization and visualization techniques.
news_summary: The Trump administration announces new tariffs linked to forced labor, replacing expiring duties; markets slide as AI spending worries hit Google and Tesla. Other key stories include UN warning on Middle East escalation, Fields Medals awarded, and a Louisiana candidate accused of rape.
papers_summary: Papers present a HIPAA-compliant AI-augmented LIMS for clinical assays, a task taxonomy for edge bundling, benchmarking of MLLMs for multi-view interface construction, and ethical considerations on generative AI for dementia care.

en.brief: The US imposes new global tariffs tied to forced labor, stocks tumble amid AI spending concerns, and four young mathematicians receive Fields Medals. Amazon updates Alexa Plus with smarter home control, while research papers explore clinical workflow optimization and visualization techniques.
en.news_summary: The Trump administration announces new tariffs linked to forced labor, replacing expiring duties; markets slide as AI spending worries hit Google and Tesla. Other key stories include UN warning on Middle East escalation, Fields Medals awarded, and a Louisiana candidate accused of rape.
en.papers_summary: Papers present a HIPAA-compliant AI-augmented LIMS for clinical assays, a task taxonomy for edge bundling, benchmarking of MLLMs for multi-view interface construction, and ethical considerations on generative AI for dementia care.

zh.brief: 今日焦点：胡志伟英国机场险被遣返，台湾收紧陆配参选资格，中国电影《澎湖海战》因历史敏感撤档。美沙核协议引发扩散担忧，知名制片人施南生病逝。
zh.news_summary: 香港民主派前议员胡志伟在伦敦希斯罗机场被扣留，险些被遣返，最终获准入境；台湾修改陆配参选资格，要求“除籍满十年”引发争议；中国电影《澎湖海战》因触及“反清复明”民间史观而撤档。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无中文论文，英文论文涵盖AI辅助临床工作流优化、边缘捆绑可视化任务分类、多模态大模型评估等。

todays_image.caption: Just as a popcorn orchid blooms unexpectedly amid a jungle of leaves, the new tariffs will burst onto the global trade landscape following the lapse of previous duties.
todays_image.title: Popcorn Orchid
